designSystem.style: Retro-analog with earthy matte forest green and deep indigo on warm textured cream. Aged gold accents, dashed stamp borders, ruled paper texture, thick offset box shadows, and serif typographic hierarchy evoking a guild registry or illuminated manuscript.

features: Horizontal scroll guild cards on Home
Horizontal scroll category filters on Guilds
Horizontal scroll soundscape selector on Flow
Horizontal scroll guild filter on Journal
Live flow timer with ambient presence panes
Post-flow ritual journal with mood selector
